sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("Key objects:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] < 100 and n['color'] not in ['g', 'B']:
        center = None
        if n['boundary']:
            rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
            cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
            center = (sum(rows)//len(rows), sum(cols)//len(cols))
        if n['pixels'] > 1 or n['color'] in ['W', 'G', 'M']:
            print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, center={center}, children={n['children']}")

# Count white pixels in ring area
print("\nWhite pixels near ring area:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] < 50:
        center = None
        if n['boundary']:
            rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
            cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
            center = (sum(rows)//len(rows), sum(cols)//len(cols))
        print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, center={center}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
